news.title: American Tower Weighs DISH Default Against Data Center Growth And Valuation
news.summary: DISH Network has defaulted on lease payments to American Tower, leading the tower operator to pursue legal action to recover unpaid obligations. The company has updated its 2026 outlook to reflect the impact of lost DISH lease revenue on its US tower business. Management is leaning on tighter operations, a focus on developed markets, and expansion of its data center platform to offset these headwinds. For investors watching NYSE:AMT at a share price of $190.19, the DISH default is a...

news.title: American Tower Corp (AMT) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Robust Growth Amidst Challenges
news.summary: American Tower Corp (AMT) reports strong AFFO and data center growth, while navigating DISH-related challenges and global market opportunities.

news.title: American Tower Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
news.summary: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) executives emphasized durable long-term demand for wireless infrastructure and interconnection-rich data centers while outlining a 2026 outlook shaped by DISH’s payment default and elevated churn in parts of the company’s international footprint. 2025 performance and strat

news.title: American Tower (AMT) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
news.summary: The backbone of our revenue growth is mobile data consumption, which continues to grow rapidly alongside growth in mobile customers, 5G adoption, and fixed wireless access.  On top of this, with trillions of dollars being deployed into AI, it is likely that new AI applications will propel mobile data consumption even higher and require greater bandwidth, lower latency, and more uplink capacity than today's typical usage.  As carriers invest in this capacity, we expect our U.S. portfolio to deliver durable, long-term, mid-single-digit organic growth.

news.title: American Tower Corp. (NYSE:AMT) Q4 2025 Earnings: AFFO Per Share Crushes Estimates, 2026 Revenue Outlook Cautious
news.summary: American Tower (AMT) posted strong Q4 2025 results, beating profit forecasts with robust leasing demand. However, its 2026 revenue outlook fell short of analyst expectations.

news.title: American Tower: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
news.summary: BOSTON (AP) — American Tower Corp. (AMT) on Tuesday reported a key measure of profitability in its fourth quarter.  The results surpassed Wall Street expectations.  The real estate investment trust, based in Boston, said it had funds from operations of $1.23 billion, or $2.63 per share, in the period.

news.title: American Tower Sees Robust Leasing Demand Across Towers, Data Centers
news.summary: American Tower Corp. (NYSE: AMT) reported Q4 results, beating earnings and revenue expectations. CEO prioritizes durable revenue growth.

news.title: UBS Maintains Buy on American Tower, Lowers Price Target to $248
news.summary: UBS  analyst Batya Levi   maintains American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $254 to $248.

news.title: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on American Tower, Lowers Price Target to $214
news.summary: Scotiabank  analyst Maher Yaghi   maintains American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Sector Outperform and lowers the price target from $220 to $214.

news.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on American Tower, Lowers Price Target to $220
news.summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Simon Flannery   maintains American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $225 to $220.
